name: RS Group plc
description: RS Group plc is a leading global omni-channel provider of industrial and electronic products and solutions. Headquartered in the United Kingdom, the company serves as a vital partner to engineers and procurement professionals, offering a vast range of components, tools, and consumables. Through its primary trading brands, including RS Components, the group leverages digital platforms and deep technical expertise to provide high-quality products and value-added services. RS Group focuses on delivering efficiency, innovation, and reliability to its customers across the industrial, electronics, and maintenance sectors worldwide, supporting the entire product lifecycle from design to maintenance.
